change_summary: Shadow-audited inside-day compression breakout continuation candidates across three fixed OHLCV windows without changing production strategy code.
hypothesis: An inside-day compression breakout continuation shadow entry may surface replayable trend-continuation candidates with useful forward returns and limited same-day A/B overlap, distinct from recent pullback reclaim, opening-range, gap-and-hold, VCP, sector-leadership, and add-on trigger families.
notes: Artifact: docs/experiments/artifacts/exp_20260426_057_inside_day_compression_shadow.json. Candidate counts were 99/128/117 across late_strong/mid_weak/old_thin; same-day A/B overlap was 10.10%/14.06%/23.08%; 10d forward return was -1.51%/+2.67%/+0.12%. Decision: observed_only; production integration is not justified because the dominant recent window is negative and aggregate 10d edge is weak.

locked_variables: inside-day compression breakout shadow entry definition; no production strategy changes
parameters.single_causal_variable: inside-day compression breakout shadow entry definition
